response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through founding and maintaining GISCollective, plus proven ability to design and operate high-performance distributed systems. However, modern C++ expertise is severely dated (2014-2015), with primary recent work in TypeScript/Node.js, not the critical systems language required. While his polyglot background and demonstrated mastery across multiple technology stacks are assets, the C++ gap is significant for a mid-senior IC role owning critical routing infrastructure. Suitable for ramp-up consideration if team can support skill refreshment.
strengths: Deep geospatial and GIS domain expertise through founding GISCollective and green-space mapping work, significantly reducing domain learning curve
Proven design and operation of high-performance distributed systems handling millions of requests/second with low-latency, real-time requirements
Senior-level track record of software craftsmanship with strong emphasis on testing, TDD, and building maintainable systems across diverse tech stacks
concerns: Modern C++ development experience is 10+ years outdated (ended 2014-2015); recent 8+ years focused on TypeScript/Node.js and web stack, not systems programming
Zero Rust experience despite it being listed as acceptable alternative; no recent engagement with compiled systems languages
No demonstrated experience building, optimizing, or operating routing pipelines or production navigation systems at scale
